snippet: The Instrumental Music Program provides funding to secondary schools to assist with the additional costs of running an instrumental music program. The level of funding is determined by individual regions. Funding is calculated at the Indicative cycle and may be updated at the Confirmed cycle. Funding is allocated through credit funding. Funding also includes on-costs, specifically payroll tax and superannuation. MARC/MACC Teachers (Reference 40) Reference 40 of the SRP Guide, providing information on MARC...
